svg.text: JITTERSCOPE · GITHUB CI PROBE · SHANNON H · 2026-06-20 18:47 UTC
I ship product end to end — mobile (React Native · Expo)
and web (Next.js). Clean architecture, sharp DX, and UI
that just works. I build developer tooling and explore AI.
